steps.title: Set f of x equal to 63
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=9(2x+3)$. The question asks for the $x$-value when $f(x)=63$, so solve $$9(2x+3)=63$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is $2$. It checks because $9(2(2)+3)=9(7)=63$. The other choices make $2x+3$ larger than $7$, so they make $f(x)$ larger than $63$.
